title: Keep customer accounts lightweight and guest-first
decision: Use a guest-first customer model. Customer accounts are optional, controlled by CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_MODE, and only provide sign-in, basic profile identity, order listing, delivery access links, and password reset. Order recovery remains available without an account. Email verification stays lightweight through recovery/reset links via CUSTOMER_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_STRATEGY=recovery_only. Membership levels, subscription entitlements, points, stored balance, device management, and complex entitlement-marketing automation are intentionally deferred.
